summary: Manage Schools feature tested successfully. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - Manage Schools button visible, dialog opens with 13+ schools and toggle buttons, custom school input works, schools persist to Target Schools section.
critical_code_review_comments: Route ordering correct: GET /events/schools/available placed BEFORE GET /events/{event_id} to avoid path collision
Custom schools are correctly added to in-memory SCHOOLS list with slug ID
EventPrep.js ManageSchoolsDialog component correctly implements school management
POST /api/events/{id}/schools accepts both school_id (known) and school_name (custom)
Schools persist to MongoDB via db.events.update_one
Toggle buttons correctly show Add/Remove states based on event.school_ids
Custom school input field with placeholder 'Add a school not listed...'
All data-testid attributes present: manage-schools-button, manage-schools-dialog, custom-school-input, custom-school-add-btn, school-item-{id}, toggle-school-{id}, prep-school-{id}
seed_data_creation: Used existing test events (event_1, event_2) and created custom schools during testing (TEST Custom University, TEST New Academy, TEST Prep Academy, TEST UI School 2026, TEST Frontend School 2026)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manage Schools feature fully tested. GET /api/events/schools/available returns 10+ schools with id, name, division fields. POST /api/events/{id}/schools adds schools (school_id for known, school_name for custom). DELETE /api/events/{id}/schools/{school_id} removes schools. Event Prep page at /events/{id}/prep has 'Manage Schools' button in Target Schools section that opens ManageSchoolsDialog. Dialog shows all available schools with toggle buttons and custom school input field. Schools are ranked by athlete overlap in prep page. Empty state shows 'No schools added yet' with Add Schools CTA. data-testid selectors: manage-schools-button, manage-schools-dialog, add-schools-empty-cta, school-item-{id}, toggle-school-{id}, custom-school-input, custom-school-add-btn, add-custom-school-form, prep-school-{id}. Manage Athletes dialog regression test passed.

frontend_ui: Event Prep page loads for event_1 - PASS
Manage Schools button visible with data-testid='manage-schools-button' - PASS
Manage Schools dialog opens on button click - PASS
Dialog shows 13+ schools with toggle buttons - PASS
Known schools (ucla, stanford, duke, pepperdine) visible - PASS
Custom school input field visible - PASS
Custom school Add button visible - PASS
Adding custom school increments school count (13 -> 14) - PASS
Toggle school changes button state (Virginia: Remove -> Add) - PASS
Target Schools section shows 10+ schools after dialog close - PASS

verified_requirements.GET_schools_available_returns_10_plus: PASS - Returns 13+ schools with id, name, division
verified_requirements.POST_schools_with_school_id: PASS - Adds known school (pepperdine, ucla, boston-college)
verified_requirements.POST_schools_with_school_name: PASS - Adds custom school with slug ID
verified_requirements.schools_persist_to_mongodb: PASS - Verified via GET after POST/DELETE
verified_requirements.manage_schools_button_visible: PASS - Button in Target Schools section header
verified_requirements.manage_schools_dialog_shows_schools: PASS - Dialog shows all available schools with toggles
verified_requirements.custom_school_input_works: PASS - Type name, press Add creates custom school
verified_requirements.added_schools_in_target_schools: PASS - Schools appear in prep page Target Schools section
verified_requirements.empty_state_no_schools: PASS - API returns empty targetSchools array for new events
verified_requirements.manage_athletes_regression: PASS - Add Athletes dialog still works
